title: URBNLIVING 28L Insulated Cooler Bag on Wheels - Trolley Cart with Extendable Handle, Waterproof & Spacious, Front & Side Pockets - Perfect for Camping, BBQ, Picnic, Beach & Outdoor Adventures

description: Product Description Affordable Everyday Living Here at URBN-LIVING we strive to bring customers High Quality Everyday Products at affordable prices. We source the best materials for our products and have them manufactured with the everyday consumer in mind. High Quality Affordable Simple 28L Insulated Large Cooler Bag Trolley Cart Extendable Handle Camping BBQ Picnic Embark on your next adventure with the ultimate companion for keeping refreshments perfectly chilled – our spacious 28L Insulated Cooler Bag on Wheels. Whether you're lounging on the beach, enjoying a park picnic, or hosting a backyard BBQ, this versatile cooler is designed to meet your every need. With durable wheels, a generous insulated interior, and a user-friendly design, it keeps your food and drinks cool and fresh all day long. 28L capacity insulated cooler bag on wheels, ideal for days out Available in stylish Grey or vibrant Blue. Features large waterproof and insulated main storage compartment front compartment for paperware and mesh side pockets for bottles Equipped with a large handle and wheels for easy manoeuvering. Dimensions: H 38cm x W 31cm x D 24cm. Part of the Nome range Grey Edition: Sleek, Neutral & Built for Durability For those who love a clean, modern look, the Grey version offers a sleek and versatile appearance that pairs effortlessly with any setting. Built from high-quality waterproof polyester, it not only looks great but is designed for lasting use. The fully insulated main compartment holds up to 28 liters—perfect for meals, beverages, and ice packs—while the easy-access top flap allows you to grab what you need without opening the full zipper. With smooth-rolling wheels and a comfortable handle, transporting your cooler is as effortless as it is stylish. Grey Edition: Smart Storage & Effortless Transport Organization is a breeze with the Grey cooler’s thoughtful features. A front zippered compartment neatly holds smaller essentials like utensils, napkins, or paper plates, while dual mesh side pockets provide a handy spot for water bottles or extra snacks. Whether you're heading out for a family outing or a day at the park, this cooler keeps everything in its place, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience from start to finish. Blue Edition: Vibrant, Bold & Adventure-Ready Prefer something more vibrant? The Blue variation is a bold, energetic option that adds a splash of color to any outing. Just as durable and functional as the Grey, it features the same spacious, insulated interior and top flap for quick access. Its bright color stands out at the beach or park, making it easy to locate and adding a cheerful vibe to your day. The rugged wheels and padded handle make transporting your cooler simple—even when fully loaded. Blue Edition: Practical Features Meet Eye-Catching Design The Blue cooler also shines in its organization and versatility. Like the Grey, it includes a front storage pocket and mesh side pouches for smaller items, keeping all your picnic or party essentials within easy reach. Whether you’re heading to a summer festival, a camping trip, or a sunny beach day, this cooler’s vibrant personality and practical features make it a must-have for anyone who loves to stay cool in style.
